query:
-- ============================================================
-- FAST CUT INVOICE ANALYSIS & FIXES
-- Invoice total: $277.45 ex-GST
-- Line items:
--   ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack x5 = $0.00
--   Huntgroup with Time of Day Routing x1 = $0.00
--   SmileTel Executive User License x5 = $150.00 ($30.00/seat retail)
--   Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex x5 = $0.00
--   DID Australia (1) x1 = $2.00
--   4G Data Backup Service x1 = $30.00
--   NBN TC4 Service 100/40 Speed x1 = $95.45
-- ============================================================

-- FIX 1: SS26275F - SmileTel Executive User License
-- Invoice shows 5 seats @ $30.00 retail = $150.00 revenue
-- Cost = 5 x $9.00 = $45.00
-- Currently: monthlyCost=9.00 (only 1 seat), monthlyRevenue=0.00
-- Fix: update cost to $45.00 (5 seats), link to BI00394 ($150.00 revenue)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '45.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '150.00',
  marginPercent = ROUND((150.00 - 45.00) / 150.00 * 100, 2),
  billingItemId = 'BI00394',
  serviceTypeDetail = 'SmileTel Executive User License',
  planName = 'SmileTel Executive User License',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SS26275F';

-- Update BI00394 to be service-matched to SS26275F
UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'SS26275F',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00394';

-- FIX 2: SSFXJLE7 - DID Australia (1)
-- Invoice: 1 DID @ $2.00 retail, cost $0.20
-- Currently: monthlyCost=0.20, monthlyRevenue=0.00 (unlinked)
-- Link to BI00391
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyRevenue = '2.00',
  marginPercent = ROUND((2.00 - 0.20) / 2.00 * 100, 2),
  billingItemId = 'BI00391',
  planName = 'DID Australia (1)',
  serviceTypeDetail = 'DID Australia (1)',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSFXJLE7';

UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'SSFXJLE7',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00391';

-- FIX 3: SS9R639V - ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack
-- Invoice: 5 x $0.00 = $0.00 (bundled call pack, no separate charge)
-- Cost should be $0.00 (it's included in the user license bundle)
-- Currently: monthlyCost=84.33 (WRONG - this is a bundled $0 item)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SS9R639V';

-- FIX 4: SSMLB3TH - Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex
-- Invoice: 5 x $0.00 = $0.00 (included add-on, no separate charge)
-- Currently: monthlyCost=84.33 (WRONG - this is a $0 add-on)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSMLB3TH';

-- FIX 5: S0966 - Other (4G Data Backup Service)
-- Invoice: $30.00 retail
-- Currently: monthlyCost=49.00 (WRONG - 4G Data Backup should be checked)
-- The invoice shows $30.00 retail. Cost in pricebook not set yet.
-- Keep revenue at $30.00 (already matched to BI00393)
-- Update planName to be more descriptive
UPDATE services SET
  planName = '4G Data Backup Service',
  serviceTypeDetail = '4G Data Backup Service',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0966';

-- FIX 6: S0335 - NBN 100/40 (ABB)
-- Invoice shows "NBN TC4 Service 100/40 Speed" @ $95.45 retail
-- ABB cost is $84.70 - this looks correct (ABB wholesale for 100/40)
-- But it has no revenue linked. Link BI00392 ($95.45) to S0335 instead of S0965
-- S0965 is a SasBoss stub for the same service - should be terminated
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyRevenue = '95.45',
  marginPercent = ROUND((95.45 - 84.70) / 95.45 * 100, 2),
  billingItemId = 'BI00392',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0335';

UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'S0335',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00392';

-- Terminate S0965 (SasBoss stub for Data - Internet - now linked to ABB service S0335)
UPDATE services SET
  status = 'terminated',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[MERGED] Billing item BI00392 moved to ABB service S0335 - SasBoss stub terminated'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0965';

-- FIX 7: S0964 - Voice - Services (SasBoss stub)
-- This was matched to BI00394 (Voice - Services $150.00) but SS26275F is the real service
-- Terminate this stub since SS26275F now carries the revenue
UPDATE services SET
  status = 'terminated',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[MERGED] Billing item BI00394 moved to SS26275F (SmileTel Executive User License) - SasBoss stub terminated'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0964';

-- FIX 8: S0963 - Voice - Direct In Dial Numbers (SasBoss stub)
-- Already matched to BI00391 but SSFXJLE7 is the real DID service
-- Terminate this stub
UPDATE services SET
  status = 'terminated',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[MERGED] Billing item BI00391 moved to SSFXJLE7 (DID Australia (1)) - SasBoss stub terminated'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0963';
